item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 33min 'There were no scars last season because I never thought I'd won it, I could also see th
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 33min 'There were no scars last season because I never thought I'd won it, I could also see the horses maturing and making a championship team for this season. There was an element of serenity and me thinking, He won't beat us next season.
If you asked me how I've been able to get my Mostrar más Cita Racing Post @RacingPost · 4h THE BIG READ
'Perception doesn't bother me - I don't care what people think. If you don't like it, you don't like it - I've not done anything wrong'
Read more with RacingPost+
https:// racingpost.com/news/features/ the-big-read/people-talk-about-plotting-and-targets-but-thats-my-job-its-not-because-im-devious-abYvJ8G03kFL/ … 2 4 mil
